title: Twitch will let parents stop their teens going live
summary: ﻿Parents can also set time limits, disable private messaging, and manage recommended content. ﻿Parents can also set time limits, disable private messaging, and manage recommended content. The parental controls dashboard can be found in the Account Settings under the Family Center page.
